---
title: "Workshop Schedule"
---

| Date | Theme | Main activities | Homework |
|---|---|---|---|
| June 25 | Decision trees and Markov models | Interactive lectures, decision tree coding lab, cohort Markov model coding lab | Build and interpret a basic Markov model |
| June 26 | Microsimulation modeling | Individual-level simulation, heterogeneity, patient histories, microsimulation lab | Extend a microsimulation model |
| June 27 | Sensitivity analysis | Deterministic sensitivity analysis, probabilistic sensitivity analysis, CEACs, EVPI | Complete a mini economic evaluation workflow |

## Daily rhythm

| Component | Suggested duration |
|---|---:|
| Preparation videos and reading | 1-2 hours |
| Live interactive session | 5-6 hours |
| Homework/review | 1-2 hours |
